name: Ace Pickleball Club - Magnolia
description: Ace Pickleball Club - Magnolia is a place to play pickleball in Magnolia, TX. There are 13 indoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, locker rooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule:
Monday - Friday 6 A.M. To 10 P.M
Saturday 6 A.M. To 9 P.M.
Sunday 6 A.M. To 6 P.M.
fees:
Fee required — $29 introductory first 30 days, $119 every 30 days after.

$35 drop-in pass for all day play.

name: April Sound Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at April Sound Country Club in Montgomery, TX! There are 13 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, food, water, and lights. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Bentwater Yacht and Country Club

name: Candy Cane Park
description: Candy Cane Park is a place to play pickleball in Conroe, TX. There are 6 outdoor hard and wood courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free. Reservations are available.

description: This is a non-manned facility - access is through the CourtReserve app on your phone! Once you down load the app and add our Organization, you are directed to sign our waivers and then choose your court reservation or event time. When finished, the door code will pop up on the app!
